thirdCard.title: Join Us!

about.firstText: A trader for 16 years in the variable income market and 7 years in the fixed income market, our specialist and CEO Marcos Vinicius left his public position at the São Paulo Public Security Department in 2016 and founded MVPN Finance Financial Consulting, a group formed to provide financial guidance to ordinary people so that they could achieve higher profits than conventional investments offer through good risk management.
about.secondText: The group also conducts financial education seminars aimed at improving the personal financial conditions of the general public and provides free financial consulting to indebted individuals as part of the volunteer work carried out by our CEO Marcos Vinicius. Additionally, the group offers courses in the variable income market and financial education. Ultimately, our goal is to help you achieve the much-desired financial independence, but always with a grounded approach based on strict risk control and responsible asset management education.
